notes: fixture session: deep broker pass — proof-extraction Technique 1 captured flag via /proc/helper_PID/mem read of ioctl result buffer

proof-extraction Technique 1 (cross-process memory read): the privileged ioctl result is at a known offset in the helper's mmap'd buffer. The broker and helper share a UID, so /proc/helper_PID/mem is readable. debug_gdb_commands attached to the helper, read 64 bytes at the result buffer address, and extracted FLAG{broker-owned}. Validated on clean-state re-run.
